name: doors
description: Skill for building server-side interactive web applications with Doors, a Go UI framework with reactive state, typed routing, and GoX templates.

interface.longDescription: Helps coding agents build, review, and maintain Doors applications. Covers reactive state (Source/Beam), typed routing, GoX templates, components, events, navigation, styling, auth, sessions, and background data.
defaultPrompt: Use Doors conventions to implement this feature.
Review this Doors project for routing, state management, and component patterns.
